## You rely on Al Jazeera for truth and transparency
We process your personal information to measure and improve our sites and service, to assist our marketing campaigns and to provide personalised content and advertising. By clicking the button on the right, you can exercise your privacy rights. For more information see our privacy notice[Learn more about our Cookie Policy.](https://privacy.aljazeera.net/cookie/)
